message:
fix(node): repair 5 pre-existing test failures from security hardening commits

- epoch_scoped_keys: update KAV expected hash after domain separator addition (e6e85f4)
- revocation_freshness_gate: fix critical_at_boundary_denied to expect Err(Stale) under fail-closed semantics
- revocation_freshness_gate: fix standard_fresh_proof_passes epoch (95→96) so staleness < max_staleness
- proof_scheduler: use dispatched[0].job_id instead of queued[0] since dispatch_jobs orders by priority

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
